history.text: Treaty of Berlin set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Tripartite Convention set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Colonisation by Germany brought the territory under colonial rule.
Occupied by New Zealand placed the territory under outside control.
League mandate placed the territory under outside administration before modern independence.
United Nations trusteeship shaped the transition toward self-government.
Western Samoa Act 1961 appears in Samoa's historical record.

worthSeeing.title: To Sua Ocean Trench:
worthSeeing.text: Stunning natural swimming hole connected to the ocean through a lava tube.

worthSeeing.title: Lalomanu Beach:
worthSeeing.text: One of the South Pacific's most beautiful beaches, with traditional fale accommodation.

worthSeeing.title: Robert Louis Stevenson Museum:
worthSeeing.text: The Scottish author's former home and final resting place in Apia.
